title: Heart Of The Judge

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the heart of heaven’s court,
The Mighty One takes His stand,
Judging nations, lifting truth,
Calling justice by His hand.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise and defend the weak,
Be a light for those in need.
Free the helpless from their chains,
Let the voice of love remain.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Blind are they who walk in pride,
Shadows hide their steps below.
Earth’s foundation shakes with grief,
As the seeds of mercy grow.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: You are called as gods on earth,
Bearing light in mortal frames.
But the night will claim your breath,
If you turn from heaven’s name.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise and defend the weak,
Be a light for those in need.
Free the helpless from their chains,
Let the voice of love remain.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Rise and defend the weak,
Be a light for those in need.
Free the helpless from their chains,
Let the voice of love remain.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Rise and defend, let love remain.

epigraph: for thou shalt inherit all nations
styleNote: Gentle Strums Building Slowly · Melodic And Uplifting · Introspective And Expansive Tone
